Sami is my favorite!

Hello, there Lena here. I am addicted to this place so much so I feel guilty how many times I go a week. I need to save money but it is so fresh and delicious. I have to do better but I highly recommend.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Queen City Bowl, Very Berry Base

reviews_data.review_text: I just left this place and I bought two things, one smoothie and one bowl. I had to drink the smoothie because I didn't realize I'm going to be stuck in this freaking terrible traffic. Good God Mooresville! I'm from Charlotte and I feel like this would be equivalent to me being stuck on WT Harris for an hour! But the smoothie that I got was so darn good I forgot all about being angry in traffic lol. What I like about this place vs others, the flavor combos were very good. The smoothie has a great texture vs your typical icy texture with fillers and probably powders. This place tastes like the real fruits and they seem generous with it too! I'll definitely be back!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Sunset Bowl

reviews_data.review_text: I love the Acai bowls. The Sunset is my favorite. It's a perfect blend!
I go here everyday I am addicted to their Palm bowls. Such a better choice than fast food, healthy, taste great!
I am addicted to their Palm bowls and biscoff bowl. I go everyday faithfully I love this better than fast food, fills you up, healthy and taste great!
Delicious Very Berry base with Strawberries, Mango and toppings.  Quick service.  Inside sitting area just right.  Could use a water fountain in the store
I have to have a bowl everyday it’s so good!!! A fav is the biscoff bowl love it!
Love it here.

I would give this place a higher score but today when I went in, I got the palm bowl but substituted for the superhuman base and wanted to add pistachio cream ( keep in mind, adding it was an extra $2.50 ). I went home and the bowl had minimal amount of pistachio cream and they forgot the nutella sauce as well.(the palm bowl comes with nutella on it). My bowl was a little over $16, so it’s just disappointing. Ingredients are fresh and the bowl was good, but was expecting to get what I paid for.
I Love this place! I’ve been on a weight loss journey but still crave a sweet treat and this hits the spot every time. My new addiction!

good food - quick and easy ordering
Love it! Always quick service and fresh ingredients and bowls! Love the snack size!

I've always enjoyed quality, generous bowls from this Palm Berries. This is the best location with the best service as well! I've tried Cornelius, Denver, Hickory, & Boone palm berries, and this is definitely the best one. Always Very consistent, always efficient, always good taste & presentation of all bowls, and always very friendly people! :) I love palm berries in Mooresville and I visit daily. I love yall so much.

The manager at palm berries in mooresville doesn’t care about customer service….do not go there….they don’t care if there’s order mistakes…I let them know that last time there was mango in my food (highly allergic, like epi pen allergic) and this time they didn’t put any fruit in a fruit base bowl so we got a $13 bowl of Nutella and chocolate chips.  I just wanted to educate them on what has happened twice with my orders and he doesn’t care that he’s lost a customer, just kept insisting that people order bowls with just Nutella and chocolate chips….yea…ok.  He’s lucky we didn’t have a reaction to the mango!  I was a regular and will not buy again due to the lack of customer service or care.

I love coming here! I go at least once a week and   always great service and delicious smoothies and bowls! Highly recommend! I got the queen dream smoothie and the horizon sunset, and a half gallon tub of açaí very berry to eat at home with fruit for a really good price! Thanks palm berries for your consistency to maintain great product and service and atmosphere is beautiful and chill.
The place is so cute and the food is always good! The pricing is good for how much food you get

reviews_data.review_text: Omg this is one of my favorite places ever and there’s this one worker I see,  believe her name is Vanessa? She’s one of the sweetest workers ever, gets the orders right every time and better than ever!! She’s deserves some recognition!!

Our Palm Berries experience was delightful to say the least. Our cashier/server Vanessa was the highlight of our first visit. We didn't know what to choose and Vanessa was quite helpful in suggesting some flavors/toppings for us. When I said that I forgot my wallet at home, Vanessa found our address, ran to our house, broke a window, found our wallet, repaired the window, and returned our wallet back to us. Way to go SUPERSTAR!

5 stars, will be coming back <3

reviews_data.review_text: The açaí was the best I have ever tried and the place is decorated nicely along with kind cashiers
Love the palm berries
Always fresh, always delicious. Never had a bad experience, and I tell everyone about it.

Fast friendly and Professional!!
The picture is the BLOOM bowl.

I am obsessed with your Sami and Protein bowls. I went into the Mooresville location on Sunday around 6:55 pm thinking you closed at 8pm like the rest of the week. I ordered 3 bowls and the young lady provided me outstanding service as if I walked in when you first opened at 11am. So many retail businesses have employees that make customers feel unwelcome if they come in at the close of business because I guess they would rather just go home. You will have a competitive edge continuing to staff your stores with bright, passionate people committed to servicing your customers! Customers will continue to come because you have a fantastic product...they will stay because of their experience!

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Oatmeal, Acai Bowl with Fruit and Nutella, Choose Two Fruits

reviews_data.review_text: I Love the açaí bowls. They are always made perfect. Everyone that works there is super nice. Ordering on the app helps and it’s usually ready when I get there. They are a little expensive but worth it.

review_questions.Recommended dishes: Acai Bowl with Fruit and Nutella

reviews_data.review_text: Excellent customer service and the best açaí bowls and the smoothies are great too.

This place is so so good! Portions are Huge, I would highly recommend getting the small instead of the ‘regular’.
Overall flavor and presentation is pretty good, my only feedback is that the inside seating is extremely quite, making this feel like a place to work rather than a a casual hang out place. I would recommend bumping up your music a tad!

lemme tell you that when i entered palm berries for the first time, i was not prepared for what i was about to experience. the protein bowl has brought a new light to my life that i simply cannot explain. their fruit is always perfectly ripe, the base always has the perfect consistency, and the vibe is always right. this place has completely changed the course of my life and i don’t think i would be the same without it.

If you want all natural açaí with inexpensive options, you should make this place home.  I always recommend this over any other açaí place in Charlotte.  Coming from charlotte it’s worth the ride.

I’m impressed with the staff even when I see new faces.  I know them bowls will be on point.  Always satisfied thank you Palm berries
Their bowls are the best! The Sami bowl is my favorite! I eat here once a week!
I enjoy their bowls so much more than other places it honestly makes me want to franchise another Palm Berries location lol The bowls are always great and the staff is friendly
Took a bit for orders to be processed and staff seemed a bit disorganized, but interactions and product were both good, and tables were clean.

I literally come here at least once or twice a week and they NEVER disappoint. I love how consistent they are and the ambiance of the space is phenomenal. The workers are so nice and always make recommendations according to my likings. I always leave satisfied and eager to get back! Keep being amazing 🫶🏽

This place is nothing short of amazing, the staff is very helpful and the bowls are made in a timely manner. You can never go wrong with a palmberry bowl.

Love the bowels and smoothies!  Your staff is awesome and such a relaxing atmosphere!  I love this place.
Palmberries is always clean and consistently fresh. I would recommend to anyone who wants a refreshing taste of fresh food!
It’s amazing and I love going!

Had my first treat here! The protein bowl was delicious!
The strawberries and bananas was great!
Service was very good and quick!
yummy food
always great customer service and taste amazing!!
Delicious

Service is absolutely amazing! Everything I have ever gotten was amazing!

The food is very good, the only problem is I found a hair in my food, i knew it wasn’t my hair because it was a different color than mine and it was in the middle of the bowl. When I walked in both workers had their hair pulled to the side and looked like they weren’t even trying to have it pulled back.

This is one of the best açaí bowl/ smoothie shops I’ve been to in the US!
Cute store
Friendly staff
Wide variety
You can sample before you buy
Fair prices
Great size options
I will definitely be stopping in again!
Green Sip is tasty and the ambiance is nice.
The acai bowls are very yummy. In the attached picture is the Sami bowl with coconut flakes and blueberries added. Very yummy!  I find myself craving the blows and visiting often.
Loved the atmosphere and the service was great!  Excellent ingredients and very tasty!  We'll be back and definitely recommend!
I love the Mooresville location
Great service!
Fresh ingredients and fast service
Palm Berries is always so good! My favorite is the the protein bowl with a super human base😊
The Brazilian blend was delicious. You wouldn't even know it was healthy by the taste!
Bowls are always made accurately. Ingredients are plentiful
We love Palm Berries! Amy is the sweetest and gives excellent customer service.
They’re the best! Delicious bowls. The Queen city is my favorite

My husband and I got the jumbo protein bowl to share. To be honest you see the $18 price and think wow that’s a little pricey BUT This was so worth it . We even had left overs for the next day . Very filling and delicious . Worth the money spent . Every bite is bursting with delicious flavors . Definetly  will be back soon.
Love this place, the decor and nutritious, delicious food are a whole vibe!!
Love ❤️ this place ! Staff is super friendly ,place is super clean, and fruit bowl 🥣 are amazing delicious!! Recommend if you want a delicious taste!
Super fresh and healthy.  Large portions and great customer service 👌

Love their bowls! I ordered a medium and once I started eating thought "I'll never be able to finish this" but it was so good I ate every bite. I built my own with the pink base which is super tasty. Have gone 3-4 times and it's been great each time.
Melanie was great and I want her snap chat.
Great place, must go in Mooresville
Every time I come here the staff is welcoming and always have my order ready to go. The fruit is always fresh and prepared beautifully! I love it, and i come here three to four times a week!
I love this place! So refreshing and tasty!
They are always super nice, bowls are always prepared fast and the environment is awesome!
Excellent quality food and ingredients.  Pleasant environment.
Yummy and quick as always
Always fresh.
ACAI BOWLS ARE THE BEST HERE!!!!
Yummmmmmm!
I was surprised at how quick our order came out.
Great service and great smoothie
I always order here. They’ve always been super nice and everything is absolutely delicious!!!! I bring it to my work friends almost every week :)
Fresh, healthy, clean  wholesome food!
Staff is always friendly, bowls are delicious!

We liked it so much the first time we went there, we had to go back again the next day. I did a build your own with their superhuman base and it was so good and satisfying !  I want to know how we can franchise this back in Chicago
The best açaí bowls!! Generous amount of fruit and toppings! Love that the offer a snack size.

I went to a 5 miles walk went to a different açaí truck close by and the ladies weren’t friendly so I decided to look to Palm berries close by and drove 25 minutes to a new location. the customer service and the açaí is the best. Wish they have little more açaí but otherwise great.pic for mooresville store. I went this last visit to Denver store.
Love the decor and vibe inside store, friendly staff and easy to order

Granola is far from good. The açaí was icy. The fruit was soggy. The açaí to fruit ratio was off. I have had many açaí bowls in my day, many good but few bad. This ranks as the absolute worst açaí bowl I have ever had. If you are thinking about getting these açaí bowls-just go to the grocery store and eat a frozen one.
Great service
Best refreshing place to eat ever.
Such yummy bowls! Always super quick and super affordable 😊
Staff is very friendly and attentive
Love their bowls! Definitely my new favorite!!
This Palm Berries has the BEST staff.
Excellent!

My experience today was a much longer wait time however it was delicious as always. How do I get credit for my other purchases? no one explained to me about the point system I had to figure that out myself.  today was my 3rd visit and only one I received credit for.

Everytime I come into palm berries the staff are welcoming and so helpful in deciding what to add! I especially love their rewards, I was basically able to get half off a bowl! Açaí bowls are new to me but now I love coming here!! So delicious you will not be disappointed!
Every order as been made to perfection! Every interaction with the staff has been wonderful!
I love Palm Berries. It’s always fresh and tastes great!
Best açaí bowls in Moorseville no joke!! The Smoothies are phenomenal as well

Just got the Green Sip smoothie and it was delicious. I wanted to try something new because I always get the bowls. It was the best smoothie I’ve ever had. Sorry I drank it too fast to take a picture 😂
Very good, had a protein bowl.

Love the bowls and slightly addicted!!! 😝

My Bf & I drive 30 mins 2/3 times a week to get an acai bowl! They have the best acai bowls! I’m really hoping a location opens up in Statesville closer to us!
Always delicious and fresh.one of my favorite treats!
I love their bowls and they are super friendly!!!

so fresh and good literally every time

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hello Ziggy,

Thank you for reaching out. We apologize about your experience today at Palm Berries. We strive to provide the best customer service possible. We are going to talk to our employees and educate them on our products since we did hire new staff. Also, the smell comes from the nail salon that is next to us. We try to alleviate the smell however sometimes it is out of our control. I hope you understand and give us another chance!

Palm Berries
reviews_data.review_text: Don't go here if you have allergies. The place reeks of cheap perfume and asking the staff if they can accommodate even one food allergy confuses them.
Always a line but worth the wait. The fruit bowls are soooo delicious!!

The bowls are amazing and they definitely give you your money’s worth. The products is also consistent each time I have been there. I definitely recommend if you haven’t been there yet stop in and give them a try! You won’t be disappointed.
Wonderful!
Palm Berries treats are delicious and healthy. Great staff and atmosphere!
Always fresh! Just can’t replicate this at home. I could eat one for every meal!!
What an amazing place to get açaí bowls! These are just as authentic as the ones in Brazil! So good!

reviews_data.review_text: I just left this place and I bought two things, one smoothie and one bowl. I had to drink the smoothie because I didn't realize I'm going to be stuck in this freaking terrible traffic. Good God Mooresville! I'm from Charlotte and I feel like this would be equivalent to me being stuck on WT Harris for an hour! But the smoothie that I got was so darn good I forgot all about being angry in traffic lol. What I like about this place vs others, the flavor combos were very good. The smoothie has a great texture vs your typical icy texture with fillers and probably powders. This place tastes like the real fruits and they seem generous with it too! I'll definitely be back!

I've always enjoyed quality, generous bowls from this Palm Berries. This is the best location with the best service as well! I've tried Cornelius, Denver, Hickory, & Boone palm berries, and this is definitely the best one. Always Very consistent, always efficient, always good taste & presentation of all bowls, and always very friendly people! :) I love palm berries in Mooresville and I visit daily. I love yall so much.

The manager at palm berries in mooresville doesn’t care about customer service….do not go there….they don’t care if there’s order mistakes…I let them know that last time there was mango in my food (highly allergic, like epi pen allergic) and this time they didn’t put any fruit in a fruit base bowl so we got a $13 bowl of Nutella and chocolate chips.  I just wanted to educate them on what has happened twice with my orders and he doesn’t care that he’s lost a customer, just kept insisting that people order bowls with just Nutella and chocolate chips….yea…ok.  He’s lucky we didn’t have a reaction to the mango!  I was a regular and will not buy again due to the lack of customer service or care.

I love coming here! I go at least once a week and   always great service and delicious smoothies and bowls! Highly recommend! I got the queen dream smoothie and the horizon sunset, and a half gallon tub of açaí very berry to eat at home with fruit for a really good price! Thanks palm berries for your consistency to maintain great product and service and atmosphere is beautiful and chill.
The place is so cute and the food is always good! The pricing is good for how much food you get

reviews_data.review_text: Omg this is one of my favorite places ever and there’s this one worker I see,  believe her name is Vanessa? She’s one of the sweetest workers ever, gets the orders right every time and better than ever!! She’s deserves some recognition!!

Our Palm Berries experience was delightful to say the least. Our cashier/server Vanessa was the highlight of our first visit. We didn't know what to choose and Vanessa was quite helpful in suggesting some flavors/toppings for us. When I said that I forgot my wallet at home, Vanessa found our address, ran to our house, broke a window, found our wallet, repaired the window, and returned our wallet back to us. Way to go SUPERSTAR!

Love the palm berries
Always fresh, always delicious. Never had a bad experience, and I tell everyone about it.

Fast friendly and Professional!!
The picture is the BLOOM bowl.

I am obsessed with your Sami and Protein bowls. I went into the Mooresville location on Sunday around 6:55 pm thinking you closed at 8pm like the rest of the week. I ordered 3 bowls and the young lady provided me outstanding service as if I walked in when you first opened at 11am. So many retail businesses have employees that make customers feel unwelcome if they come in at the close of business because I guess they would rather just go home. You will have a competitive edge continuing to staff your stores with bright, passionate people committed to servicing your customers! Customers will continue to come because you have a fantastic product...they will stay because of their experience!

reviews_data.review_text: Excellent customer service and the best açaí bowls and the smoothies are great too.

This place is so so good! Portions are Huge, I would highly recommend getting the small instead of the ‘regular’.
Overall flavor and presentation is pretty good, my only feedback is that the inside seating is extremely quite, making this feel like a place to work rather than a a casual hang out place. I would recommend bumping up your music a tad!

lemme tell you that when i entered palm berries for the first time, i was not prepared for what i was about to experience. the protein bowl has brought a new light to my life that i simply cannot explain. their fruit is always perfectly ripe, the base always has the perfect consistency, and the vibe is always right. this place has completely changed the course of my life and i don’t think i would be the same without it.

If you want all natural açaí with inexpensive options, you should make this place home.  I always recommend this over any other açaí place in Charlotte.  Coming from charlotte it’s worth the ride.

I’m impressed with the staff even when I see new faces.  I know them bowls will be on point.  Always satisfied thank you Palm berries
Their bowls are the best! The Sami bowl is my favorite! I eat here once a week!
I enjoy their bowls so much more than other places it honestly makes me want to franchise another Palm Berries location lol The bowls are always great and the staff is friendly
Took a bit for orders to be processed and staff seemed a bit disorganized, but interactions and product were both good, and tables were clean.

I literally come here at least once or twice a week and they NEVER disappoint. I love how consistent they are and the ambiance of the space is phenomenal. The workers are so nice and always make recommendations according to my likings. I always leave satisfied and eager to get back! Keep being amazing 🫶🏽

reviews_data.owner_answer:
Hello Ziggy,

Thank you for reaching out. We apologize about your experience today at Palm Berries. We strive to provide the best customer service possible. We are going to talk to our employees and educate them on our products since we did hire new staff. Also, the smell comes from the nail salon that is next to us. We try to alleviate the smell however sometimes it is out of our control. I hope you understand and give us another chance!

Palm Berries
reviews_data.review_text: Don't go here if you have allergies. The place reeks of cheap perfume and asking the staff if they can accommodate even one food allergy confuses them.
Always a line but worth the wait. The fruit bowls are soooo delicious!!

The bowls are amazing and they definitely give you your money’s worth. The products is also consistent each time I have been there. I definitely recommend if you haven’t been there yet stop in and give them a try! You won’t be disappointed.
Wonderful!
Palm Berries treats are delicious and healthy. Great staff and atmosphere!
Always fresh! Just can’t replicate this at home. I could eat one for every meal!!
What an amazing place to get açaí bowls! These are just as authentic as the ones in Brazil! So good!
